assessment.note: He links being less present to not knowing what needed to change after the promotion decision, a strong engagement drop with an off-signature clarity issue that should be probed next.

new_queue.label: Needed change
new_queue.name: When you say 'what needed to change' — what felt unclear to you?
new_queue.description: Clarifies the specific expectations or gaps he felt he was left to infer after the decision.

new_queue.label: Energy read
new_queue.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?
new_queue.description: Separates energy from output; avoids leading with 'is something wrong'.

new_queue.label: Unsaid piece
new_queue.name: What part of that decision feels most unfinished for you now?
new_queue.description: Gently probes unresolved disappointment without naming it for him.

new_queue.label: Mentoring fit
new_queue.name: How is the mentoring program fitting alongside your core product work right now?
new_queue.description: Tests whether the mentoring work is a healthy stretch or a quiet detour.

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would help make the next couple of weeks steadier for you?
new_queue.description: Closes on concrete support and next-step stability without opening a new issue.
